title: selaginella exaltata
intro: Selaginella exaltata, also known as the spiked resurrection fern, is a type of epiphytic plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Selaginella exaltata include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in health benefits, including its ability to reduce stress, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an immune system booster. The herbal preparations of Selaginella exaltata include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
